title: MassiveMC
description: MassiveMC is a modpack full of a bunch of different mods. From shaders to optimization to decoration, this has it all. So yeah, if you want to try it out, try it out and have fun.
body:
# MassiveMC

## Description

MassiveMC is a modpack that features many different mods, from shaders to optimization to decorated to gui tweaks, it's got it all. It's fun to play with.

## Mods

There are a lot of mods...

- 3D Skin Layers
- AmbientSounds
- ApexCore
- AppleSkin
- Architectury API
- AstraLex Shaders
- BSL Shaders
- Better Mount HUD
- Better Statistics Screen
- BetterF3
- Blockus
- Blur (Fabric)
- Borderless Mining
- Break Free
- Capes
- Carpet
- Chat Heads
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Cloth Config API
- Collective
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Continuity
- Convenient Decor
- Craftify
- CreativeCore
- Debugify
- Deeper Oceans

I'm too lazy to list the rest. Maybe I'll list the rest one day.
